name: modelwatch
description: LLM Data Policy Tracker — track data retention and model training policies

scripts.validate: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const j=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('providers.json','utf-8'));const p=j.providers;const e=p.filter(x=>!x.id||!x.name||!x.surface||!x.surfaceType||!x.category||!x.rating||!x.training||!x.retention||!x.zdr||!x.location||!x.sourceUrl||!x.sourceDate||!['full','partial','none'].includes(x.zdr.status));if(e.length){console.error('❌',e.length,'provider(s) missing required fields:',e.map(x=>x.id||'?'));process.exit(1)}console.log('✅ providers.json —',p.length,'providers, last updated',j.meta.lastUpdated)"
